files.content:
<svg width="48" height="48" viewBox="-10.2941 -10.2941 44.5884 44.5884" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <rect x="-10.2941" y="-10.2941" width="44.5884" height="44.5884" rx="15" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.1"/>
    <style>
        @keyframes popup {
            0% {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: scale(0);
            }
            100% {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: scale(1);
            }
        }
        #angular-logo {
            animation: popup 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.68, -0.55, 0.265, 1.55) forwards;
        }
    </style>
    <g id="angular-logo">
        <title>Angular</title><path fill="currentColor" d="M16.712 17.711H7.288l-1.204 2.916L12 24l5.916-3.373-1.204-2.916ZM14.692 0l7.832 16.855.814-12.856L14.692 0ZM9.308 0 .662 3.999l.814 12.856L9.308 0Zm-.405 13.93h6.198L12 6.396 8.903 13.93Z"/>
    </g>
</svg>
